summary: Full end-to-end testing of Akshay Babu SDET portfolio (backend + frontend). All 8 backend pytest cases pass (100%). All required frontend flows pass including section rendering, nav smooth-scroll, stats cards, resume download (200, correct content-type), automation demo typewriter + logs (BUILD PASSED) + replay reset, skills filter (Automation reduces 33->8, All restores to 33), experience timeline (3 items), 6 project cards, Ask AI streaming with content mentioning SDET/automation + suggestion + reset, contact form (empty=error toast, valid=success toast + inputs cleared + Mongo persistence verified), contact-resume-download, footer year 2026.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider migrating to lifespan handlers.
/api/contact does not validate email format (any string is accepted); add Pydantic EmailStr for stricter validation.

logger is defined after it is referenced inside chat_stream's except block (logging.basicConfig + getLogger are at end of file). It works because the function executes later, but it's fragile — move logger init to top of file.
RESUME_CONTEXT is a very large in-module constant (~60 lines). Acceptable, but could be moved to a separate data file for cleanliness.
CORS allow_origins='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec; browsers will reject credentialed requests. Either restrict origins or set allow_credentials=False.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed contact_messages row during testing; no residual seed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers /api/, /api/health, /api/chat/stream (valid + empty), /api/contact (valid + missing + missing-keys), /api/resume/download. Streaming chat is text/plain (no transfer-encoding header in this stack — assertion checks content-length is None OR chunked). AskAI welcome message stays inside ask-ai-messages after reset (length ~148 chars), which is expected. Skills test-ids are skill-{name} (NOT skill-item-{i}); selector must exclude skills-filter-*. AutomationDemo only animates when scrolled into view (framer-motion useInView).
